title: Stress free fly-In safari from start to finish
text: Due to Joshua we had an excellent experience arranging our fly-in safari, thanks to his great support we received throughout the planning process. Everything was handled with care and attention, making the entire experience completely stress-free. Communication with him was always prompt, clear, and professional, and we felt very well looked after at every stage.

title: Beautiful Botswana!
text: Our family of 8 had a wonderful wet-season safari in Botswana, on a trip arranged by Anton Vosloo of Lelobu Safaris. We were met at the Maun airport by our amazing guides, Master and Joseph, and promptly set off on 9 days of mobile safari, breaking it up in the middle with 3.5 days at Oddballs' Camp, for walking safari and mokoro trips, including to the Xaxaba village. Our camps, on the  Boteti River, in the Central Kalahari Game Reserve, in the Okovango Delta and near Khwai were beautiful, private and safe. All were super well supported by the camping crews. The wildlife was just amazing -- herds of elephants, impala, kudu, zebra; groups of hippos, bushbuck, giraffes; occasional lions, jackals, wild dogs, hyenas, bat-eared foxes and an aardwolf; birds including bee-eaters, weavers, hornbills, cranes, storks, and the iconic lilac-breasted rollers; the list is so long. Being the rainy season, we had much of our first stops to ourselves. Also being the rainy season, plans had to be adjusted due to conditions, and the Lelobu office supported our trip really well, including arranging a last-minute charter flight to get us to our flights when the roads went south. That was extra expense, but was fully covered by our travel insurance. We came home deeply impressed with Botswana, its wildlife, its landscape, its people and its culture.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris
placeInfo.address: Maun  Botswana, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

text:
We had such brilliant service with Lelobu Safaris. They help design and get everything organised for our amazing holiday safari tours in Botswana. Joshua was amazing always able to get in contact with him, giving great advice when needed.
So we totally recommend this company to organise your holidays. 
Couldn’t fault them.
Again thanks for everything.

title: Great Stay at Oddballs Camp
text: Our stay at Oddballs Camp was nothing short of unforgettable. From the moment we arrived on the tiny airstrip surrounded by the beauty of the Okavango Delta, me and my kids knew we were in for something special. The camp strikes a wonderful balance between comfort and authenticity.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris
placeInfo.address: Maun  Botswana, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

original_title: Great Stay at Oddballs Camp
original_text: Our stay at Oddballs Camp was nothing short of unforgettable. From the moment we arrived on the tiny airstrip surrounded by the beauty of the Okavango Delta, me and my kids knew we were in for something special. The camp strikes a wonderful balance between comfort and authenticity.
translated_title: Great Stay at Oddballs Camp
translated_text: Our stay at Oddballs Camp was nothing short of unforgettable. From the moment we arrived on the tiny airstrip surrounded by the beauty of the Okavango Delta, me and my kids knew we were in for something special. The camp strikes a wonderful balance between comfort and authenticity.

title: Excellent Company
text:
Lelobu Safaris was everything I hoped for and more. From the moment I arrived in Maun, everything ran smoothly. I was greeted at the airport by friendly staff, Moss, who made me feel welcome and safe. Communication with them before and during the trip was easy and professional. She helped me get cash at the ATM and even helped me with wifi and connecting my phone. She walked me to the bush plane company while I waited for departure. Lelobu was highly communicative by email, very professional, and very thorough in their paperwork. I didn’t know where I wanted to stay and they recommended Oddballs and it was a perfect match for what I was looking for.

At camp, everything felt like family. The Okavango Delta was literally in the “backyard,” and the staff treated us as if we were part of their home. My guide, Richard, was exceptional. He grew up in the Delta and his knowledge of the land, wildlife, and traditions was invaluable. He was respectful of the animals, patient with questions, and genuinely kind. He also went out of his way to engage with all guests, even those he wasn’t assigned to guide.

From mokoro rides among hippos and elephants to bush walks spotting giraffe and zebra, every moment was incredible. The food was fresh and delicious, and the entire experience felt authentic, respectful, and deeply connected to nature. I felt safe, cared for, and immersed. I would return in a heartbeat and recommend Lelobu to anyone seeking a truly special safari. Reach out to them to plan the trip of your dreams!

title: A top-notch company that creates unforgettable experiences
text: For the third time, I used Lelobu for my trip back to Botswana this past June. They are impeccable from start to finish! I always feel so well taken care of before and during my trips. As a solo traveler, this is especially comforting! I even had to reach out to them with a question on a Sunday while in country and they responded immediately, putting my mind at ease about some logistics for early the following morning. There is so much value to working with a local company, and being based in Maun, Lelobu has intimate knowledge of the options available to people like me who are only able to visit Beautiful Botswana every few years. Their recommendations for lodging and activities are always reliable and rewarding, and they are respectful of budgets and wish-lists. I am already counting down the days until I can get back, and I will be working with Lelobu again when I do. They are simply the best!

title: Victoria Falls/Chobe/Okavango Delta Adventure
text:
Lelobu Safaris helped us plan a perfect African adventure (Zimbabwe/Botswana)!   We had some very specific areas we wanted needed to explore.  Joshua Vosloo of Lelobu was extremely patient and coordinated our complex trip.  We had perfect transfers, perfect spots to stay, and extremely friendly guides and hosts.  The communication was very prompt and clear.  Our trip included Victoria Falls (the falls & Zambezi National Park) in Zimbabwe, and Chobe National Part and the Okavanga Delta in Botswana.
Our camp suggested by Joshua for Chobe was Jackalberry.   It was one of the most serene places we’ve ever slept.  It’s along the Chobe River (close to the park gate).  The staff was also extremely kind.  The ‘tent’ was nicer than almost every hotel we’ve stayed.    
Our camp suggested by Joshua for the Okavango Delta was Oddballs.   The best word to describe this place is glorious.   We arrived in a 6 passenger (including the pilots) plane on a dirt runway from Kasane.    Walked from the plane to our tent!  My God it was cool!  The camp is on the edge of water and a family of elephants was in the water a few hundred meters (at most) when we arrived.  Incredible!
Jackalberry & Oddballs were so incredible that I’m writing specific 10 star reviews for them, as well.
In summary, what made Lelobu Safaris so fantastic is that Joshua listened to what we wanted to do, coordinated the trip that we wanted, provided excellent transfers and camps, and communicated timely and effectively before and during the trip (I would recommend having WhatsApp on your phone).  The communication aspect can’t be stressed enough.  Planning a trip from 9,000 miles and 6 time zones away is stressful and difficult.  Joshua made it easy.  Call this crew.  You won’t regret it.  Visit Zimbabwe and Botswana.  It will change your life.

title: feeleng cared over the top. feel cared for with a thousand attentions
text:
i really want to thank you this organization! Darya has been amazing! this company has been next to us in the best way planning our last second amazing safari. unluckly we had to change our plans. the care they gave us is a rare professional experience! 
we could not leave, but the professionalism with which Darya and the company followed us to plan in a week a last second trip in detail and with the cuddle of months of work was really amazing. listening, education, timing, seriousness. really rare pearls. I hope soon to be able to leave with them because they were amazing

title: Professional Lelobu Safaris for wonderful Okavango trip
text:
After doing a lot of research for our Okavango Delta experience, we came across Lelobu Safaris who recommended a 5-day experience at Camp Khwai at a reasonable budget that we could afford. Our agent was Josh, and he timeously and accurately answered all our questions.
Finally, last week, my wife and I spent our 5 days at Camp Khwai. We would definitely return if we had an opportunity, and would use Lelobu Safaris for future safari bookings. Game viewing at Camp Khwai was coordinated by our extremely professional, informative and knowledgeable guide Emax (Emanuel). We saw a ton of game such as leopard: twice; lion (including their cubs): twice; wild dogs including seeing their cubs: twice; wild hunting dogs feasting on an impala, not to mention elephant, buffalo, hippo, crocs, jackal, hyena, etc. as well as an abundance of birds including the extremely rare Pel fishing Owl. Emax also provided lots of entertainment with his great sense of humour. Our viewing activities included a morning Mokoro ride where the canal was blocked by elephants (elephant have right of way), a day in Moremi game reserve, and a scenic heli-flight over the delta.
Our food was superbly prepared by the imaginative and amazing chef Lady G (Goitse) and her staff. The food was even more impressive and tasty given that we have a restricted diet, and the sumptuous combinations that Lady G came up with were mouthwatering. Josh at Lelobu Safaris helped with the food coordination.
Our tent was very clean and comfortable with a mosquito net for the bed, and we were given hot water bottles for the freezing nights. The solar heated showers didn’t work that well, but for us, that was a minor detail. We had a picture postcard view with the Khwai river from the balcony of our tent and saw many animals by day. At night, we had an orchestra of hippos calling, hyena cries and lion roars. Wonderful! 
The camp also advertised walking tours in its website, but in fact there are not offered because the staff aren’t apparently allowed to carry rifles. With the amount of game that we saw however, it didn’t matter. We were given a night game ride, and it was amazing to see hippos and elephant in the dark.
Thanks Lelobu Safaris for a wonderful experience.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris
placeInfo.address: Maun  Botswana, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Southern Africa is amazing with Lelobu Safaris
text:
This was our second southern Africa experience planned by Lelobu Safaris.   They planned every detail with perfection.  We had the best of South Africa and Botswana.  I highly recommend this company.

We had a wonderful visit in Capetown with a beautiful beachfront stay in Camps Bay. The manor house stay in the wine region of Franschhoek was amazing.

While in Botswana, we visited 3 different camps.  All had their own unique vibe.  The animal viewing was spectacular.   

We were 5 women traveling and felt safe and secure the entire time.

I can't say enough about Lelobu and the Vosloo family.  I am a forever client.

We had a wonderful visit in Capetown with a beautiful beachfront stay in Camps Bay. The manor house stay in the wine region of Franschhoek was amazing.

While in Botswana, we visited 3 different camps.  All had their own unique vibe.  The animal viewing was spectacular.   

We were 5 women traveling and felt safe and secure the entire time.

I can't say enough about Lelobu and the Vosloo family.  I am a forever client.

title: City, Wine Country and Safaris Trip!
text:
Working with Lelobu Safaris took all of the stress of traveling to the African continent away.  They handled bookings in the Cape Town area, the wine country surrounding the charming town of Franschhoek, and Safaris in Botswana. Plus a day trip for us to Zimbabwe to experience Victoria Falls.  Our accommodations were special and very comfortable.  Our Safari experiences were absolutely amazing. 

They took great care at every step of our planning to answer our many questions and accommodate our diverse group of five strong-minded women.  I am especially impressed that during our trip, we had a few questions.  They responded promptly in a helpful and friendly manner.  I highly recommend this small, local group for your travel needs to Africa!

ownerResponse.text: It was such a pleasure to organise your trip to both South Africa and Botswana Nancy. Thank you so much for the amazing feedback. Hopefully we will be seeing you again soon, there's always more to see and explore.

title: Botswana  wild camping experience
text: I can highly  recommend this company, very professional. Any question or quire I had was delt with in a very timely  manner. I was kept well informed. The camping with bushways was exceptional went above and beyond my expectations. We had a guide/ driver and a cook. Everything was catered for. We took everything we needed with us as we were wild camping in the bush, no modern facilities Our safety as a group was a priority. The food was amazing, freshly baked bread and even a celebratory  cake was made for one of the ladies in the group as a suprise.  Special Meals  prepared for the vegetarians in the group as well.We were able to have a hot shower at every stop if we wanted. The tents and equipment  were well maintained.   We even had a toilet seat in the toilet tent with toilet paper!!! Early to bed and early to rise, Game drives, Wow as a group we saw so much from the smallest to the largest. Listening to the hippos and the roar of the lions in camp was amazing. I would repeat this adventure  again in a heart beat.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for the fantastic feedback and we are so happy that you enjoyed your time in the wild. It was such a pleasure to help with your safari in Botswana and we all hope we can welcome you back soon.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris
placeInfo.address: Maun  Botswana, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: No stress trip of a lifetime
text: Lelobu Safaris provided impeccable support as we experienced the trip of a lifetime. Our stay at the rustic Oddballs camp right on a channel of the Delta gave us access to all the wonders of this paradise while ensuring our safety and the welfare of the animals. Such a peaceful and intimate way to experience both the ecosystem and the local community.  Chobe provided closer encounters and photo opportunities with higher end accommodation. The people of Botswana have made this country feel like a home away from home. Thank you to Joshua from Lelobu Safaris for arranging all this along with seamless transfers all the way to Victoria Falls.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for such amazing feedback and it was truly a pleasure to help with your safari. We hope we can welcome you back soon and explore more of Botswana.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris
placeInfo.address: Maun  Botswana, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Wonderful experience with Lelobou!
text: After speaking with a few travel agents pushing very high-end itineraries that didn’t quite meet our interest in a varied and more down-to-earth safari experience for our family of four (kids 10 and 13), I was very excited to find Anton and Rebecca at Lelobu Safaries. Anton helped me zero in on three different places — three nights at a lovely lodge (Mma Dinare) on a private concession with regular game drives and night drives, three nights at a fabulous mobile camp (with Chase Africa Safaris) in the Moremi national park, and three nights at a peaceful lodge specializing in walking and traditional mokoro (canoe) safaris, including a wonderful village visit. Anton facilitated an experience that was both 30% less expensive than other agents and much more suited to our interests and needs. I will also say that our wildlife sightings were over-the-top amazing. We saw cheetahs hunting and killing a warthog, many leopards and lions, over a hundred bird species, and countless other beautiful creatures. Thank you, Anton and Rebecca, for helping us experience the wonderful of Botswana!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for the wonderful feedback and thank you for booking with us. From all of us at Lelobu Safaris, it was truly a pleasure to help at every moment of your adventure.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris
placeInfo.address: Maun  Botswana, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Happy with our 6 night fly in Botswana safai
text: Joshua at Lelobu Safaris organised a 6 night fly in safari at 2 different camps in Botswana for us at the end of March.  We were very happy with the food, accommodation, guides and friendly staff. The transfers also worked well. Joshua was easy to communicate with and answered all my questions. He provided us with a good holiday experience at a  price within our budget. I would recommend this company and be happy to use their services again.

ownerResponse.text:
We really appreciate your feedback and I hope we can welcome you back to Botswana soon. There is always so much more to explore.

Thank you again from all of us here at Lelobu Safaris

title: Book your Botswana Safari with Lelobu Safaris
text: I got a quote from a luxury safari booking company for two nights at Chobe Game Lodge, two nights at Camp Akavango, and two nights at Camp Moremi. After doing some Google research, I saw good reviews for Lelobu Safaris. The quote I ended up getting from Lelobu was for several thousand dollars less than what I would’ve paid with the other company.  I decided to go with Lelobu even though it was less known than the other company. I just got back to the United States after an amazing safari.  Everything was flawless.  I would absolutely recommend Lelobu Safari to anyone booking a trip to Botswana.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for the great feedback and we are all so happy that you had a fantastic safari. From everyone at Lelobu Safaris, it was a pleasure to arrange your Botswana safari.

title: Great visit to Okavango
text: My visit largely exceeded my expectations. From the information and orientation I got from Lelobu Safaris (Joshua) to the administrative arrangements prior to the trip, the connection and support in Maun, and stay at the camp and safaris, everything was seamless, efficient, and successful. The safaris were superb with close views of lions, giraffes, zebras, a leopard, elephants, crocodiles, hippos, wild dogs, etc. I guess we were lucky because safaris could be unpredictable, but the abundance of fauna in the area makes it relatively more likely that you will see interesting things. Camp Khwai has an excellent location, with easy access to the Moremi reserve. You can see many animals right in front of the camp facilities. The rooms are very comfortable and clean and the food is great. And the best of all was its friendly and helpful staff. I don't know other places in the Okavango Delta but I would definitely recommend this camp and Lelobu Safaris. I had an unforgettable experience.

ownerResponse.text: We are so glad that you enjoyed your safari and our services. We loved being able to arrange it for you.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris

title: Magical landscape, wonderful people and delicious food
text: Joshua did an amazing job organizing our Safari trip. We started planning this trip quite late.  Few of US based agents I talked to all told me it is too late to book Botswana this year.  Joshua was able to book 2 very uniquely different camps for 7 of us at Okavango Delta and Chobe National Park.  One camp allowed us to explore the wilderness through mokoro rides and walking safaris, while the other brought us up close to the wildlife from the comfort of a vehicle. We thoroughly enjoyed both experiences. We also added on 2 nights in Victoria Fall.   Everything went seamlessly, Joshua was always quick to response and keep us informed.  My husband and I are already dreaming of doing a Mobile Safari someday in the region, and when that time comes, Lelobu will be the company we use for sure.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for the wonderful feedback. We can't wait to welcome you back for a mobile safari and would always love to help again.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris
placeInfo.address: Maun  Botswana, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Amazing safari!
text: Joshua from Lelobu was so incredibly helpful and patient with all my many questions while planning our safari in Botswana. And it was incredible!! All 9 of us, 7 adults & 2 young children, had an amazing time. Everything was just fantastic! We saw so many animals, many up close. The 2 campsites we stayed in were so beautiful , we heard wild animals during the night. Our guide, Master, was the best!! He was so kind, calm & knowledgeable about everything in the bush. The camp staff & cook, MG,  were also incredible! We had delicious food served every day & night. I highly recommend Lelobu!!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for the wonderful feedback and it was an absolute pleasure to plan your safari in Botswana. We hope we can welcome you back soon as there is always so much more to explore.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris

title: I wish I could give them more than five stars! Dream trip made possibly by the amazing Lelobu team.
text: We are a very-well traveled family of four (I have been to over 60 countries) and this was our first trip to Africa and my dream, milestone birthday, trip, that I have been saving for and dreaming of for literally decades. I spoke to over two dozen travel experts before deciding that Anton and his team at Lelobu were going to be the perfect team to help make my African dreams come true. No detail was too large or too small. Anton and his team were professional, responsive, prompt, and always looking out for my family’s best interests. When an issue arose towards the end of the trip, they immediately rectified it. We left for a boat safari and by the time we returned and I had WiFi again, everything was taken care of. Using a Botswana-based travel expert is absolutely the way to go. They know the best places and get the best deals. Additionally, they have staff in South Africa and I used them to plan the Cape Town portion of our trip. Anton, Joshua, Rebecca, and the whole team were always available and treated us with upmost respect and professionalism. Every client is their most important client and you can’t go wrong with Lelobu. We are based in US and I’m not sure when we’ll ever be able to come back to Africa, but if that golden opportunity arises, I’ll be reaching out to this team again. HIGHLY recommend!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for sending us such great feedback. On behalf of the whole team, we really loved helping with your safari and Cape Town tour. Whether that golden opportunity comes sooner or later, we can't wait to welcome  you back to Botswana. There is always more to see and do.

placeInfo.name: Lelobu Safaris
placeInfo.address: Maun  Botswana, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Mokoro in Dry season
text: We used Lelobu Safaris in Maun, for our Okavango Delta and Moremi Game Reserve in Feb, it was great to have local knowledge and they gave us a mokoro trip in one of the only areas that it was still possible.

ownerResponse.text: We are so happy that you enjoyed your safari with us and thank you for giving us the opportunity to help plan it with you.  We hope one day we can welcome you back for another adventure.
